title: phleum pratense subsp. bertolonii
intro: Phleum pratense subsp. bertolonii, also known as Italian timothy grass, is a subspecies of perennial grass that belongs to the Poaceae family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Phleum pratense subsp. bertolonii include reducing inflammation and improving respiratory health, as well as supporting the immune system. The plant can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and extracts, which are commonly consumed to promote overall well-being and alleviate symptoms of various health conditions.
